detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use clockps driver.

sect1.title: xclockps_i2c_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XClockPs driver directly. This example uses xclockps APIs to enable the I2C0_REF clock. It then uses set and get APIs to set and get the I2C0_REF clock rates.
